availability_text: My Practice at a Glance Available online only New York, NY 10040 (914) 256-2371 Email Me Share I come to this field following a career in musical theater and am passionate about the power of storytelling to heal and create belonging. $200 Per Session, I accept insurance I see individuals, couples and groups
raw_card_text: Becca Brunelle Pre-Licensed Professional, BFA, MHC-LP Online Only Are you a musician, actor, dancer, entertainer or any other type of creative identifying person navigating trauma, depression, anxiety, OCD, eating disorders, or other mental health challenges? As a musical theater actress turned therapist myself, I want you to know that you’re not alone. In my practice, you’ll find a safe, authentic space where all emotions are welcome, and healing is possible. I work with you to explore your feelings and goals in a compassionate, non-judgmental environment. No matter your gender, sexual identity, race, or economic background, you’ll receive support that helps you thrive and create with confidence. raw_profile_text: Becca Brunelle, Pre-Licensed Professional, New York, NY, 10040 | Psychology Today Psychology Today Therapists US Log In Sign Up and Get Listed Home New York New York Becca Brunelle Pre-Licensed Professional, BFA, MHC-LP (914) 256-2371 or Email Me Becca Brunelle Pre-Licensed Professional, BFA, MHC-LP (she, her) Verified by Psychology Today Are you a musician, actor, dancer, entertainer or any other type of creative identifying person navigating trauma, depression, anxiety, OCD, eating disorders, or other mental health challenges? As a musical theater actress turned therapist myself, I want you to know that you’re not alone. In my practice, you’ll find a safe, authentic space where all emotions are welcome, and healing is possible. I work with you to explore your feelings and goals in a compassionate, non-judgmental environment. No matter your gender, sexual identity, race, or economic background, you’ll receive support that helps you thrive and create with confidence. I take a client-centered, relational approach because it is my belief that, when the trauma is relational, the healing must also be relational. I work to build authentic relationships with all of my clients utilizing a variety of therapeutic modalities based on the individual need of the client. If you are looking for an authentic, compassion focused, and non-judgmental space to begin your therapy journey, I hope you will consider reaching out. I like to offer all potential clients a complimentary 15 minute consultation call to see if we might be a fit for each other and if I am not a fit for you, I will do my best to help you find someone who is. parent_friendly_summary: Becca offers a safe, non-judgmental space for creative teens and young adults to explore their emotions and heal through authentic connection.
possible_good_fit_for: Teens and young adults in creative fields
Individuals seeking a relational approach to trauma
Those looking for an LGBTQ-affirming space
possible_less_ideal_if: You are seeking in-person sessions, as this practice is online only
You prefer a therapist with many years of post-licensure experience
parent_question_suggestions: How do you incorporate creativity or storytelling into your sessions with teens?
Can you tell me more about your relational approach to healing?
How do you involve parents in the therapy process for a teen?
confidence_notes: Profile explicitly mentions a background in musical theater and a passion for storytelling.
The focus on creative individuals and relational healing is clearly stated.
